revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:POV statement/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:POV statement/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:POV statement/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:POV statement/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:POV statement/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:POV statement/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Template notes |The editor placing this template in an article should promptly begin a discussion on the article's talk page. In the absence of any discussion, or if the discussion has become dormant, then this tag may be removed by any editor. |The purpose of this group of templates is to attract editors with different viewpoints to edit articles that need additional insight. This template should not be used as a [[badge of shame]]. |This template should only be applied to articles that are reasonably believed to misrepresent the views of [[WP:RS|high-quality reliable sources]] in the subject. The personal beliefs of Wikipedia's editors are irrelevant. |Do not add this to a page more than a reasonable number of times, instead use one of the other templates mentioned [[#Templates|below]] instead. }} Add {{POV statement}} after a statement or [[:en:Posit|Posit]] to signify that just that statement may not be entirely without bias. === Parameters === * {{para|1}} (or an empty parameter): specifies the section on the talk page the "disputed" link points to. * {{para|date}}: the date that the tag was placed. Thus: :{{Tlx|POV statement|Objection|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} produces :{{POV statement|Objection|date=January 2013}}, where "disputed" links to Talk:Article_name#Objection. Hovering over the link "neutrality" reveals the date that the tag was placed. ==Redirects== {{list redirects|Template:POV statement}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Use this inline template to tag a statement that may not be entirely without bias. The editor placing the template must start a relevant talk page discussion.", "format": "inline", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "Month and year of tagging; e.g., 'January 2013', but not 'jan13'", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Section name on talk page", "description": "Section name on talk page where further information or discussion can be found", "type": "string" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1" ] } ==Resolving disputes - templates== {{Dispute templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Neutrality templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Inline dispute templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[hu:Sablon:Elfogult]] [[no:Mal:Partisk utsagn]] [[sv:Mall:POV-mening]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Template notes |The editor placing this template in an article should promptly begin a discussion on the article's talk page. In the absence of any discussion, or if the discussion has become dormant, then this tag may be removed by any editor. |The purpose of this group of templates is to attract editors with different viewpoints to edit articles that need additional insight. This template should not be used as a [[badge of shame]]. |This template should only be applied to articles that are reasonably believed to misrepresent the views of [[WP:RS|high-quality reliable sources]] in the subject. The personal beliefs of Wikipedia's editors are irrelevant. |Do not add this to a page more than a reasonable number of times, instead use one of the other templates mentioned [[#Templates|below]] instead. }} Add {{POV statement}} after a statement or [[:en:Posit|Posit]] to signify that just that statement may not be entirely without bias. === Parameters === * {{para|1}} (or an empty parameter): specifies the section on the talk page the "disputed" link points to. * {{para|date}}: the date that the tag was placed. Thus: :{{Tlx|POV statement|Objection|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} produces :{{POV statement|Objection|date=January 2013}}, where "disputed" links to Talk:Article_name#Objection. Hovering over the link "neutrality" reveals the date that the tag was placed. ==Redirects== {{list redirects|Template:POV statement}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Use this inline template to tag a statement that may not be entirely without bias. The editor placing the template must start a relevant talk page discussion.", "format": "inline", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "Month and year of tagging; e.g., 'January 2013', but not 'jan13'", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Section name on talk page", "description": "Section name on talk page where further information or discussion can be found", "type": "string" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1" ] } ==Resolving disputes - templates== {{Dispute templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Neutrality templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Inline dispute templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[hu:Sablon:Elfogult]] [[no:Mal:Partisk utsagn]] [[sv:Mall:POV-mening]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23524127410|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} == Usage == {{Template notes |The editor placing this template in an article should promptly begin a discussion on the article's talk page. In the absence of any discussion, or if the discussion has become dormant, then this tag may be removed by any editor. |The purpose of this group of templates is to attract editors with different viewpoints to edit articles that need additional insight. This template should not be used as a [[badge of shame]]. |This template should only be applied to articles that are reasonably believed to misrepresent the views of [[WP:RS|high-quality reliable sources]] in the subject. The personal beliefs of Wikipedia's editors are irrelevant. |Do not add this to a page more than a reasonable number of times, instead use one of the other templates mentioned [[#Templates|below]] instead. }} Add {{POV statement}} after a statement or [[:en:Posit|Posit]] to signify that just that statement may not be entirely without bias. === Parameters === * {{para|1}} (or an empty parameter): specifies the section on the talk page the "disputed" link points to. * {{para|date}}: the date that the tag was placed. Thus: :{{Tlx|POV statement|Objection|date{{=}}{{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} produces :{{POV statement|Objection|date=January 2013}}, where "disputed" links to Talk:Article_name#Objection. Hovering over the link "neutrality" reveals the date that the tag was placed. ==Redirects== {{list redirects|Template:POV statement}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "description": "Use this inline template to tag a statement that may not be entirely without bias. The editor placing the template must start a relevant talk page discussion.", "format": "inline", "params": { "date": { "label": "Month and year", "description": "Month and year of tagging; e.g., 'January 2013', but not 'jan13'", "type": "string", "autovalue": "May 2025", "example": "January 2013", "suggested": true }, "1": { "label": "Section name on talk page", "description": "Section name on talk page where further information or discussion can be found", "type": "string" } }, "paramOrder": [ "date", "1" ] } ==Resolving disputes - templates== {{Dispute templates}} {{Sandbox other|| [[hu:Sablon:Elfogult]] [[no:Mal:Partisk utsagn]] [[sv:Mall:POV-mening]] }} [[Category:Neutrality templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Inline dispute templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 3 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
